content.heading: hi, uday here..
content.description: Student at Delhi Technological University. I build systems that solves problems and make strange little projects at the intersection of tech and art by night. Occasionally both happen at the same time.

about.heading: / about me
paragraphs: Hello! I'm Uday, a B.Tech student at Delhi Technological University with a deep passion for computer science and software development.
I enjoy building things from scratch, whether that means engineering a real-time logistics tracker, designing an interactive UI, or pushing my limits in 36-hour hackathons.
Currently, my focus is on mastering full-stack platforms and mobile experiences using React and Flutter, while consistently crushing algorithmic puzzles in C++.

bullets: Competed in a rigorous 36-hour hackathon at Delhi Technological University.
Collaborated with a team to conceptualize and develop functional prototypes under strict time constraints.
Engineered solutions utilizing modern web frameworks to ensure a seamless user experience.
Registered and led a development team for the national-level Smart India Hackathon.
Focused on solving real-world logistical and tracking problems using scalable software architecture.
Competed in a rigorous 24-hour hackathon organized by the MSIT.
Won & Developed a prototype aimed at identifying early children mental problems using AI and games.

projects.title: Rayride
projects.description: A comprehensive logistics and tracking system featuring real-time map polylines and socket service integration for live driver location tracking.

projects.title: Spotify-Web App
projects.description: A web-based clone of the Spotify application, handling audio streaming states and dynamic CSS UI components.

projects.title: Budgit
projects.description: A mobile application designed for intuitive food budgeting and expense tracking. Features a custom-built budget controller logic and sleek UI.

projects.title: IoT Smart Recycling Bin
projects.description: An automated smart bin system modeled using pushdown automaton and state transition diagrams to theoretically optimize waste management logic.

projects.title: Surat Sparkle Storefront
projects.description: A digital storefront and comprehensive branding identity for a jewelry company, including modular UI for their 10+1 monthly subscription plan.

items.title: 400+ DSA Problems Solved
items.description: Consistently crushing complex algorithmic problems. Deep focus on dynamic programming, graph theory, and advanced tree structures to push time and space complexities to their absolute limits.

items.title: brAInwave 2.0 Winner
items.description: Engineered a real-time smart logistics platform featuring sub-optimal routing and socket pipelines. Fought through 36 hours of sleep deprivation to take 1st place.

items.title: AWS Solutions Architect
items.description: Validated expertise in designing distributed, fault-tolerant cloud topologies, edge optimization vectors, and scalable backend infrastructure.

items.title: Captain, Null Pointers
items.description: Led an engineering cohort of 6 to build embedded IoT systems for regional ecological automation tracks.
